name: Taglierini with Butter and White Truffles
method: Serves 4 1 quantity tajerini 80 g unsalted butter, melted 100 g freshly grated parmigiano fresh white truffle or truffle oil, for garnish

Make the tajerini, then boil in plenty of salted water for just a few minutes. Drain the pasta and place it in a heated serving dish. Pour the melted butter over it, add the parmigiano and mix together.
